---
title: "Landing Page"
subtitle: "MDIG2026"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-title: "Contents"
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: false
    code-tools: true
    theme: cosmo
engine: knitr
---

![](images/banner.png){fig-align="center" width=100%}
